info.title: SAP
info.description:
This service is located at [https://services.OData.org/service-root/](https://services.OData.org/service-root/)

## Entity Data Model
![ER Diagram](https://yuml.me/diagram/class/[BusinessPartner{bg:orange}],[BusinessPartner]++-[CT_Address],[BusinessPartner]-*>[SalesOrder{bg:orange}],[BusinessPartner]-*>[Contact{bg:orange}],[BusinessPartner]-*>[Product{bg:orange}],[Product{bg:orange}],[Product]->[BusinessPartner{bg:orange}],[Product]-*>[SalesOrderLineItem{bg:orange}],[SalesOrder{bg:orange}],[SalesOrder]->[BusinessPartner{bg:orange}],[SalesOrder]-*>[SalesOrderLineItem{bg:orange}],[SalesOrderLineItem{bg:orange}],[SalesOrderLineItem]->[SalesOrder{bg:orange}],[SalesOrderLineItem]->[Product{bg:orange}],[Contact{bg:orange}],[Contact]++-[CT_Address],[Contact]->[BusinessPartner{bg:orange}],[VH_Sex{bg:orange}],[VH_Country{bg:orange}],[VH_AddressType{bg:orange}],[VH_Category{bg:orange}],[VH_Currency{bg:orange}],[VH_UnitQuantity{bg:orange}],[VH_UnitWeight{bg:orange}],[VH_UnitLength{bg:orange}],[VH_ProductTypeCode{bg:orange}],[VH_BPRole{bg:orange}],[VH_Language{bg:orange}],[CT_Address],[CT_String],[BusinessPartnerSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[BusinessPartner],[ProductSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[Product],[SalesOrderSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[SalesOrder],[SalesOrderLineItemSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[SalesOrderLineItem],[ContactSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[Contact],[VH_SexSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_Sex],[VH_CountrySet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_Country],[VH_AddressTypeSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_AddressType],[VH_CategorySet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_Category],[VH_CurrencySet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_Currency],[VH_UnitQuantitySet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_UnitQuantity],[VH_UnitWeightSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_UnitWeight],[VH_UnitLengthSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_UnitLength],[VH_ProductTypeCodeSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_ProductTypeCode],[VH_BPRoleSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_BPRole],[VH_LanguageSet{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[VH_Language],[RegenerateAllData{bg:dodgerblue}]->[CT_String],[SalesOrder_Confirm{bg:dodgerblue}]->[SalesOrder],[SalesOrder_Cancel{bg:dodgerblue}]->[SalesOrder],[SalesOrder_InvoiceCreated{bg:dodgerblue}]->[SalesOrder],[SalesOrd post.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Requests](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=152).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET BusinessPartnerSet HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

count.description: The number of entities in the collection. Available when using the [$inlinecount](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=67) query option.
